import{RoomObjectCategory,RoomObjectVariable}from'@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/room';import{Container}from'@pixi/display';import{Graphics}from'@pixi/graphics';import{Point,Rectangle}from'@pixi/math';export class TargetHighlightOverlay{constructor(){this._shape=null;this._cachedUserId=0;this._cachedObjectId=0;this._cacheTtl=0;}dispose(){if(this._shape){this._shape.destroy(true);this._shape=null;}this._cachedUserId=0;this._cachedObjectId=0;this._cacheTtl=0;}update(engine){var _activeRoomActiveCanv,_rpTargetUserId;if(!engine)return;const roomId=engine.activeRoomId;if(roomId<0){this.hide();return;}const canvasId=(_activeRoomActiveCanv=engine._activeRoomActiveCanvas)!==null&&_activeRoomActiveCanv!==void 0?_activeRoomActiveCanv:1;const canvas=engine.getRoomInstanceRenderingCanvas(roomId,canvasId);if(!canvas||!(canvas.master instanceof Container)){this.hide();return;}const master=canvas.master;const overlay=master.getChildByName(engine.OVERLAY);const display=canvas.display;if(!overlay||!(display instanceof Container)){this.hide();return;}const targetUserId=(_rpTargetUserId=window.__rpTargetUserId)!==null&&_rpTargetUserId!==void 0?_rpTargetUserId:0;if(targetUserId<=0){this.hide();return;}const objectId=this.resolveRoomObjectIdByUserId(engine,roomId,targetUserId);if(objectId<=0){this.hide();return;}const avatarBounds=this.getAvatarDisplayBounds(display,objectId);const rect=avatarBounds!==null&&avatarBounds!==void 0?avatarBounds:engine.getRoomObjectBoundingRectangle(roomId,objectId,RoomObjectCategory.UNIT,canvasId);if(!rect||rect.width<=0||rect.height<=0){this.hide();return;}if(!this._shape){this._shape=new Graphics();this._shape.name='rp_target_outline';this._shape.interactive=false;this._shape.eventMode='none';overlay.addChild(this._shape);}else if(this._shape.parent!==overlay){overlay.addChild(this._shape);}this.drawOutline(rect);this._shape.visible=true;}drawOutline(rect){if(!this._shape)return;const isLarge=rect.height>=56;const insetX=Math.max(2,Math.round(rect.width*(isLarge?0.08:0.04)));const insetTop=Math.max(1,Math.round(rect.height*(isLarge?0.03:0.02)));const insetBottom=Math.max(2,Math.round(rect.height*(isLarge?0.05:0.03)));const outlineX=Math.round(rect.x+insetX);const outlineY=Math.round(rect.y+insetTop);const outlineWidth=Math.max(12,Math.round(rect.width-insetX*2));const outlineHeight=Math.max(18,Math.round(rect.height-insetTop-insetBottom));const radius=Math.max(6,Math.min(16,Math.round(Math.min(outlineWidth,outlineHeight)*0.16)));this._shape.clear();this._shape.lineStyle(5,0x2f0f12,0.95,1,true);this._shape.drawRoundedRect(outlineX,outlineY,outlineWidth,outlineHeight,radius);this._shape.lineStyle(3,0xe54f63,1,1,true);this._shape.drawRoundedRect(outlineX,outlineY,outlineWidth,outlineHeight,radius);this._shape.lineStyle(1,0xffb7c0,0.95,1,true);this._shape.drawRoundedRect(outlineX+1,outlineY+1,Math.max(1,outlineWidth-2),Math.max(1,outlineHeight-2),Math.max(4,radius-2));}getAvatarDisplayBounds(display,objectId){const points=[];const objectKey=objectId.toString();for(const child of display.children){const sprite=child;if(!sprite||!sprite.visible)continue;if(sprite.name!==objectKey)continue;const bounds=sprite.getBounds();if(!bounds||bounds.width<=0||bounds.height<=0)continue;points.push(new Point(bounds.x,bounds.y),new Point(bounds.x+bounds.width,bounds.y),new Point(bounds.x+bounds.width,bounds.y+bounds.height),new Point(bounds.x,bounds.y+bounds.height));}if(!points.length)return null;let minX=Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;let minY=Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;let maxX=Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY;let maxY=Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY;for(const point of points){if(point.x<minX)minX=point.x;if(point.y<minY)minY=point.y;if(point.x>maxX)maxX=point.x;if(point.y>maxY)maxY=point.y;}if(!isFinite(minX)||!isFinite(minY)||!isFinite(maxX)||!isFinite(maxY))return null;return new Rectangle(minX,minY,Math.max(1,maxX-minX),Math.max(1,maxY-minY));}hide(){if(this._shape)this._shape.visible=false;}resolveRoomObjectIdByUserId(engine,roomId,userId){const now=performance.now();if(this._cachedUserId===userId&&this._cachedObjectId>0&&now<this._cacheTtl){return this._cachedObjectId;}const
